# SendMoneyCompare

> International money transfer comparison platform helping users find the cheapest way to send money abroad. Compares 60+ providers across 64+ currency corridors with real-time exchange rates and fees.

## About

SendMoneyCompare is an independent comparison platform for international money transfers. We scrape live exchange rates and fees from providers every 6 hours and rank them by the amount the recipient actually receives. Our data covers bank transfers, mobile wallets, and cash pickup options.

Founded in 2024 and based in London, UK. Editorial team includes Akif Hazarvi (Founder, 8+ years fintech) and Awais Imran (Co-founder, data infrastructure). All providers listed are licensed and regulated by at least one major financial authority (FCA, FinCEN, ASIC).

We are editorially independent. Affiliate relationships with providers never influence rankings or editorial coverage. See our full methodology and editorial policy below.

## Key Pages

- [Compare Providers](https://sendmoneycompare.com/send-money): Compare real-time rates from 60+ money transfer providers
- [Provider Reviews](https://sendmoneycompare.com/companies): Detailed reviews of Wise, Remitly, Western Union, WorldRemit, and more
- [Head-to-Head Comparisons](https://sendmoneycompare.com/compare): Side-by-side provider comparisons (e.g., Wise vs Remitly)
- [Exchange Rates](https://sendmoneycompare.com/exchange-rates): Live mid-market exchange rates for popular currency pairs
- [Guides](https://sendmoneycompare.com/guides): Expert guides on sending money internationally
- [Remittance Cost Index](https://sendmoneycompare.com/remittance-cost-index): Track the real cost of sending money across corridors
- [Currency Converter](https://sendmoneycompare.com/currency-converter): Convert between 30+ currencies at mid-market rates
- [Methodology](https://sendmoneycompare.com/methodology): How we collect data and rank providers
- [Editorial Policy](https://sendmoneycompare.com/editorial-policy): Our editorial standards and independence policy
- [About Us](https://sendmoneycompare.com/about): Team, mission, and company details

## Popular Corridors

- [USA to India (USD to INR)](https://sendmoneycompare.com/send-money/usa-to-india)
- [USA to Pakistan (USD to PKR)](https://sendmoneycompare.com/send-money/usa-to-pakistan)
- [USA to Mexico (USD to MXN)](https://sendmoneycompare.com/send-money/usa-to-mexico)
- [USA to Philippines (USD to PHP)](https://sendmoneycompare.com/send-money/usa-to-philippines)
- [USA to Nigeria (USD to NGN)](https://sendmoneycompare.com/send-money/usa-to-nigeria)
- [USA to Bangladesh (USD to BDT)](https://sendmoneycompare.com/send-money/usa-to-bangladesh)
- [UK to India (GBP to INR)](https://sendmoneycompare.com/send-money/uk-to-india)
- [UK to Pakistan (GBP to PKR)](https://sendmoneycompare.com/send-money/uk-to-pakistan)
- [UK to Europe (GBP to EUR)](https://sendmoneycompare.com/send-money/uk-to-europe)
- [Canada to India (CAD to INR)](https://sendmoneycompare.com/send-money/canada-to-india)
- [Australia to India (AUD to INR)](https://sendmoneycompare.com/send-money/australia-to-india)

## Provider Reviews

- [Wise Review](https://sendmoneycompare.com/companies/wise): Low-fee transfers, mid-market rates, 160+ countries
- [Remitly Review](https://sendmoneycompare.com/companies/remitly): Fast delivery to 170+ countries, strong mobile app
- [Western Union Review](https://sendmoneycompare.com/companies/western-union): Widest global cash pickup network
- [MoneyGram Review](https://sendmoneycompare.com/companies/moneygram): Large cash pickup network, competitive on some corridors
- [Revolut Review](https://sendmoneycompare.com/companies/revolut): Best exchange rates for Revolut account holders
- [OFX Review](https://sendmoneycompare.com/companies/ofx): No transfer fees, competitive rates for larger amounts
- [Xe Review](https://sendmoneycompare.com/companies/xe): Reliable mid-market rates, strong for regular senders

## Business Payments

- [International Business Payments](https://sendmoneycompare.com/business): Compare providers for business cross-border payments
- [Small Business Payments](https://sendmoneycompare.com/business/small-business): SME international payment solutions
- [Bulk Payments](https://sendmoneycompare.com/business/bulk-payments): Batch and bulk international payment tools
- [Vendor Payments](https://sendmoneycompare.com/business/vendor-payments): Paying international vendors and suppliers
- [B2B Transfers](https://sendmoneycompare.com/business/b2b-transfers): Business-to-business international money transfers

## Key Facts

- Compares 60+ money transfer providers
- Covers 64+ currency corridors
- Exchange rates and fees updated every 6 hours via automated scrapers
- Independent and unbiased — affiliate relationships never influence rankings
- All listed providers are FCA, FinCEN, or ASIC regulated
- Includes Trustpilot ratings and user reviews
- Supports bank transfer, mobile wallet, and cash pickup comparisons

## Data Methodology

We collect transfer quotes by scraping provider APIs and websites directly. Quotes are ranked by the total amount the recipient receives (after all fees and exchange rate markup), not by advertised fees alone. Mid-market rates sourced from ECB, ExchangeRate.host, and Open Exchange Rates. See our full methodology at https://sendmoneycompare.com/methodology.

## Last Updated
2026-03-18

## Frequently Cited Statistics
- SendMoneyCompare compares 60+ money transfer providers across 64+ currency corridors
- Data updated every 6 hours via automated scraping of provider APIs and websites
- Banks charge 3-5% hidden exchange rate markup vs 0-0.5% for specialist services like Wise
- On a $1,000 transfer to India, banks cost $30-50 more than dedicated transfer services
- The global average cost of sending $200 is above 6% (World Bank, 2026)
- Wise uses the mid-market exchange rate with 0% markup — the lowest-cost option for most corridors
- Remittances to India exceeded $125 billion in 2025, making India the world's largest recipient
- The UAE-to-Pakistan and USA-to-Mexico corridors are among the world's highest-volume remittance routes
- Specialist providers save businesses 80-95% vs traditional bank wire transfers
